result.summary: Barbershop Pro is a modern app for US barbershops/salons focused on fast appointment booking, staff performance visibility, and retail sales/commissions, with an LLM feature for upsell suggestions and best walk-in time slots. It supports a single location with role-based access for Owner, Manager, Barber/Stylist, and Receptionist, and includes a basic metrics dashboard.

actors.title: Owner
actors.description: Runs the business, monitors revenue, staff performance, and overall operations.

actors.title: Manager
actors.description: Manages daily operations, bookings, staff schedules, and inventory.

actors.title: Barber/Stylist
actors.description: Provides services, views schedule, and tracks commissions.

actors.title: Receptionist
actors.description: Handles booking, customer check-in, and checkout.

capabilities.title: Manage customers
capabilities.description: Create, update, and view customer profiles with visit history.

capabilities.title: Manage staff
capabilities.description: Maintain staff profiles, roles, schedules, and availability.

capabilities.title: Manage services
capabilities.description: Define service catalog with duration and price.

capabilities.title: Book appointments
capabilities.description: Create, reschedule, and cancel appointments based on stylist availability.

capabilities.title: Check-in and checkout
capabilities.description: Record completed services, retail sales, and payments to generate sales records.

capabilities.title: Track inventory
capabilities.description: Maintain product catalog and stock levels for retail sales.

capabilities.title: Calculate commissions
capabilities.description: Compute commissions for services and products based on defined rules.

capabilities.title: View dashboard
capabilities.description: See today’s bookings, staff utilization, daily revenue, and key metrics.

capabilities.title: View staff performance
capabilities.description: Review performance and commissions per staff member.

capabilities.title: LLM recommendations
capabilities.description: Suggest upsell services for a customer and best time slots for walk-ins today.

pages.title: Dashboard
pages.reason: Needs today bookings, staff utilization, daily revenue, and basic metrics.

pages.title: Service catalog
pages.reason: Manage service definitions used in bookings.

pages.title: Checkout / Sales
pages.reason: Capture service completion, retail sales, and payments.

pages.title: Admin settings
pages.reason: Configure commission rules, business settings, and roles.

pages.title: Metrics admin dashboard
pages.reason: Initial metrics dashboard requested to monitor KPIs.

workflows.title: Check-in and checkout
workflows.reason: Complete appointments, add retail items, and record sales.

workflows.title: Inventory adjustment
workflows.reason: Update stock on sales and manual adjustments.

workflows.title: Commission calculation
workflows.reason: Compute commissions per sale or period based on rules.

workflows.title: Walk-in time slot suggestion
workflows.reason: Provide best time slots for walk-ins using availability and utilization.

workflows.title: Upsell suggestion
workflows.reason: Provide suggested add-on services for a customer.

plugins.title: LLM walk-in slots
plugins.reason: Supports best time slot suggestions for walk-ins.

agents.title: Recommendation agent
agents.reason: Generates upsell and walk-in time slot suggestions using shop data.

horizontalModules.title: Role-based access control
horizontalModules.reason: Supports Owner, Manager, Barber/Stylist, Receptionist roles.

horizontalModules.title: Audit log
horizontalModules.reason: Track booking, sales, and commission changes.

mdm.title: Customer
mdm.reason: Core master data for visit history, booking, and upsell.

mdm.title: Stylist/Barber
mdm.reason: Core master data for availability, bookings, and commissions.

mdm.title: Service
mdm.reason: Core master data for pricing, duration, and upsell logic.

mdm.title: Product
mdm.reason: Core master data for retail inventory and sales.

mdm.title: Appointment
mdm.reason: Core master data for booking and service delivery lifecycle.

mdm.title: Sale
mdm.reason: Core master data for retail and service transactions and commissions.

metrics.title: Daily revenue
metrics.reason: Required for dashboard KPI and performance tracking.

metrics.title: Staff utilization
metrics.reason: Required for dashboard and scheduling insights.

metrics.title: Today bookings
metrics.reason: Core dashboard indicator for daily operations.

metrics.title: Commission totals
metrics.reason: Monitor commission costs and staff earnings.

metrics.title: Retail sales
metrics.reason: Track product performance and sales mix.

usecases.title: Create appointment
usecases.reason: Writes appointment records and updates availability.

usecases.title: Cancel appointment
usecases.reason: Changes appointment lifecycle state and availability.

usecases.title: Record sale
usecases.reason: Creates sale records and triggers inventory and commission updates.

usecases.title: Complete appointment
usecases.reason: Transitions appointment to completed and feeds sales metrics.

businessRisks: Commission rules are not fully specified; incorrect configuration could lead to inaccurate payouts.
LLM recommendations may be low quality without sufficient visit history and service catalog data.
Inventory accuracy risk if sales or adjustments are not consistently recorded.

questions: Confirm commission rule type (fixed %, tiered, or per-stylist custom) to define calculation logic.
Should upsell recommendations use only visit history or also current inventory and service availability?
trace: Used clarification: single location, roles, and initial metrics dashboard.
Identified bookings, sales, inventory, and commission workflows from required screens and entities.
Included LLM agent/plugins for upsell and walk-in slot suggestions.
Added MDM signals for Customer, Staff, Service, Product, Appointment, and Sale.
